title: bupleurum atlanticum var. mairei
intro: Bupleurum atlanticum var. mairei, also known as the Canary Island Bupleurum, is a plant species within the Apiaceae family, characterized by its unique yellow flowers and narrow leaflets. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum atlanticum var. mairei include reducing fever, relieving liver and gallbladder issues, and supporting immune system function, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Bupleurum atlanticum var. mairei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
